official_definition: Net revenue = SUM(amount - refund_amount) for orders with status 'completed', grouped by calendar month. Refunds ARE subtracted. Pending and cancelled orders are excluded.
Distinct users with at least one qualifying event in the current CALENDAR month. A qualifying event is any event, not only logins. Rolling 30-day windows are NOT used for the official MAU.
Churn = distinct users active in the prior month but inactive in the current month, divided by distinct users active in the prior month. Measured on user activity, not subscription cancellations.

Conversion = distinct sessions that resulted in a purchase divided by total distinct sessions, over a stated, explicit time window. Lead-based and session-based conversion must be labelled separately and never mixed.
AOV = net revenue (amount - refund_amount) for completed orders divided by the count of distinct completed orders. Refunds are netted; non-completed orders are excluded.
